title: Drone Intrusion Near Runway
description: A drone has been detected flying near the runway threshold. An inbound aircraft crew has reported the drone to ATC. The drone appears to have a camera payload.

event.details: Radar detection of small UAV 800m from runway 02C threshold, altitude 120m
CCTV visual confirmation of drone with camera — moving toward runway area
ATC Changi Approach reports aircraft on final approach has sighted drone — requesting ground stop decision
Drone now 200m from runway centerline — entering protected airspace

optimal_response.primary_action: notify ATC and CAAS Duty Officer immediately — request ground stop for affected runway
optimal_response.secondary_action: dispatch ground patrol to locate drone operator and alert APD
optimal_response.do_not: Do not attempt to disable, capture, or shoot down drone without APD/CAAS authorization
optimal_response.escalation: If drone on runway, escalate to Level 5 full ground stop. If payload suspected, activate BDU.
